data.description: At 6th level, you gain a benefit based on the totem animal of your choice. You can choose an animal of the same type as the one selected at 3rd level or a different one. This effect lasts until the end of your turn. If the creature is within 60 feet from you and is more than 10 feet away, and you are carrying no more than your maximum load (including maximum lift), your Strength score is doubled, giving you advantage on Strength checks, ability checks, and saving throws made to push, lift, or break objects. If the creature succeeds on its saving throw, it can't use this feature.
Starting at 14th level, when take damage from a creature within reach, you can use your reaction to make a melee attack against that creature.

[H1] can to a weapon attack against
creature.
